custom_css: /* Ensure the container takes full width and height on both desktop and mobile */.container-class {width: 100vw; /* Full width of the viewport */ height: 100vh; /* Full height of the viewport */ display: flex; justify-content: center; /* Center the images horizontally */ align-items: center; /* Center the images vertically */ overflow: hidden; /* Prevents scrolling */}
/* Make sure images within the container are responsive */.container-class img {max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; object-fit: cover; /* Ensures images fill the container without distortion */}
